rows.label: tev055201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Tora about the Nopon caravans.

rows.label: tev055201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Tora if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Tora about business negotiations with the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Tora what he did during the attack.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Tora about the battle with the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Tora if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Tora about the final battle in the Central Life.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Tora when the battle for Nopon supremacy will be settled.

rows.label: tev055201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Tora about recent developments.

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Dodonga Caravan admittedly mildly
famous. That former caravan of Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0002
rows.name:
But Dodonga Caravan cannot hold
candle to old caravan of Tora—super
amazing wonderful Dorian Caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0003
rows.name:
If friend goes east from Valley of
Oblivion canyon entrance, friend will
hit steep trench called Ibra Ravine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Head north from there to find super
Dorian Caravan. Caravan surrounded
by ginormous lake, if that help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Friend should go check it out,
see for self how wild Nopon
nomads tame savage frontier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nightglow Forest, home of Dodonga
Caravan, is to west. Valley of Oblivion,
handsome home of Tora, is to east.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0011
rows.name:
And far far FAAAR to north lies
terrible, horrifying, unspeakable—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Mrrm... Friend probably wants to see terrible
horrors for self. Friend should have same joy of
exploring and discovering Mira that Nopon have![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is very big world out there. But no matter how
far away something might seem, so long as friend
feels like going there, friend can get there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0014
rows.name:
So what is human friend waiting for? Go,
go! Use silly long legs to dash across
landscape and uncover every corner![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Tora hoping to score points with
Nopon Commerce Guild by landing
whopper of contract with Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0020
rows.name:
But for smart aliens, Ma-non
are kind of dumb. They know
NOTHING about business or money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Negotiations not going so well. Big
plan of Tora coming apart at seams.
And then who come along? Tatsu! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Tatsu walk to Ma-non and mention name of
friend. He say, "[ST:playername ] save you, right?" Then he
break out extra-large pizza and contract.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Now EVERYONE love Tatsu! How did he know so
many people? How did he learn so much about
other cultures? Unfair! Mo-mo-meeeeh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Well, Tora know when Tora is defeated...for
now. But one day, it will be Tora waving
greasy signed contract in face of Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Tora not want stupid Tatsu claiming all bits
of glory, so Tora decided to pull some favors
and scrape together supplies for city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Together with friends at home in Dorian
Caravan, Tora load up whole herd of
nopopotamuses with shipments of miranium![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0031
rows.name:
Then Tora and caravan SMASH right through Growth
soldiers to reach city! ...Tora nearly wet self from
fear. Tora not ashamed to admit that to friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0032
rows.name:
It is good that friend won.
Otherwise, harrowing experience
of Tora would have been for nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Good job, human friend! Keep punching
Growth in big stupid faces![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Tatsu say he take down that
behemoth all by himself, but
Tora not impressed at all! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0039
rows.name:
Mighty Tora actually took down Ruler of Fates
that lurks deep in Nightglow Forest. Took
him down with one paw tied behind back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Don't stare at Tora like that! Story is
completely true! Tora use Mega Torageddon
move to put hurt on nasty Ruler of Fates![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0041
rows.name:
...What? F-friend wants to know what Ruler
look like? Er, Tora cannot answer because Tora
was blinded by battle rage. Saw only red.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0046
rows.name:
Soon, Tora will be reunited
with mamapon and dadapon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0047
rows.name:
But it very important that
Tora become distinguished
merchant before reunion happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0048
rows.name:
Tora might have to hire BLADE friend to get
ball rolling, otherwise stingy Nopon Commerce
Guild never give Tora membership.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0049
rows.name:
But friend looks kind of busy. ...Also
expensive. Does friend know any novice BLADEs
who do good work for cheap? Maybe even free?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0054
rows.name:
There bound to be epic scrap, mo...
What if something happen to Tatsu...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0055
rows.name:
Say... Would friend do Tora huge favor?
Please bring Tatsu here before friends
head out for grand showdown, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0060
rows.name:
Tora hears that Growth is making all
kinds of nasty preparations. Plan
to stop friends dead in tracks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0061
rows.name:
Tatsu has to promise to be careful.
Tora not want Tatsu to die![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0062
rows.name:
This fight for human friends.
Fight they will win![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0063
rows.name:
But Tora still needs to finish battle
with Tatsu for Nopon supremacy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0064
rows.name:
Tora cannot prove who better
Nopon is if Tatsu comes back in
little body bag, so be safe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0069
rows.name:
Did Tatsu survive Central Life
death trap? Is Tatsu safe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0070
rows.name:
Mo! Good! This means Tora can
challenge Tatsu to final face-off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0071
rows.name:
Go ahead! Bring Tatsu! Tora
will not run. Tora will prove
supremacy once and for all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0076
rows.name: Mo! Right now! Why wait?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0077
rows.name:
Tora very glad Tatsu return from
Central Life death trap, but now
Tatsu must face music for real.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0078
rows.name:
Today Tora and Tatsu decide
once and for all who is greatest
Nopon! Dun dun DUNNNH![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Mo? Tatsu too hungry to have
final face-off right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0080
rows.name:
No fair! Does stupid Tatsu know how
hard Tora has been practicing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG0081
rows.name:
Tora bother all kinds of human friends to practice
rock paper scissors and duck duck goose. Did Tora
train to become true warrior for nothing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG1001
rows.name:
Now that Tora member of Nopon
Commerce Guild, wares of Tora
selling like hotcakes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG1002
rows.name:
Tora going to do just like Toton
said and treat good friends like
[ST:playername ] and Miia EXTRA special![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG1003
rows.name:
Friends get first dibs on leftover and
defective... *ahem* Er, BEST merchandise![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG1004
rows.name:
Friends not regret single purchase
ever. That what friends are for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG2001
rows.name: Has friend been to Dodonga Caravan yet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055201_MSG2002
rows.name:
Make sure to bring back nice present for Tora,
okay? After all, Tora was nice enough to tell
about amazing, best-ever caravan in first place.[ST:wait ]
